title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A video demonstrating Rocket 1.0 as an AI workflow platform designed to maintain context across multiple AI tools and models. The creator tests Rocket for building a startup MVP, comparing it against alternatives like Claude Code and evaluating its ability to serve as an integration layer for research, notes, code, and tracking.
writeup: The video demonstrates Rocket 1.0, an AI workflow platform built to maintain context across multiple AI tools and models, and tests it on building a startup MVP. It frames Rocket as an integration layer that ties together research, notes, code, and tracking in one workflow, and compares it against alternatives including Claude Code. The central concern is context management: whether a single platform can hold state across tools rather than losing it between separate models. Key themes include workflow automation, vertical integration, and low-code development.
